ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_title" TEXT /* Title of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits awarded for the course */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department offering the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the course (e.g., New, Approved, Rejected) */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course content */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* List of prerequisite courses required for enrollment */,
  "semester_offered" TEXT /* Semester(s) in which the course is typically offered */,
  "max_students" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who teaches the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "college_name" TEXT /* Name of the college to which the department belongs */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Name of the department head */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the department (e.g., building and room number) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "syllabi" (
  "syllabus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each syllabus */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course associated with the syllabus */,
  "syllabus_file" TEXT /* File path to the syllabus document */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the syllabus (e.g., Approved, Pending) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the syllabus was uploaded */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the syllabus to track revisions */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Name of the instructor who prepared the syllabus */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the syllabus was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("syllabus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_syllabi_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_proposals" (
  "proposal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each proposal */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course the proposal is for */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the proposal was submitted */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Current review status of the proposal (e.g., Under Review, Approved) */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by reviewers during the approval process */,
  "proposer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the proposal */,
  "proposal_type" TEXT /* Type of proposal (e.g., New Course, Course Update) */,
  "proposal_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the proposal (e.g., New Research, Curriculum Update) */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the proposal was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("proposal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_proposals_proposer_id FOREIGN KEY ("proposer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_proposals_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., faculty, admin, reviewer) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department to which the user belongs */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the user within the department (e.g., Professor, Chair) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login to the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission record */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "can_create_proposal" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user can create course proposals */,
  "can_approve_syllabus" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user can approve syllabi */,
  "can_view_syllabi" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user can view syllabi */,
  "can_edit_syllabi" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user can edit syllabi */,
  "can_view_proposals" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user can view course proposals */,
  "can_edit_proposals" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user can edit course proposals */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)
